song.title: Every Day Is a Wonder
song.albumTitle: Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical)

twitter.title: Every Day Is a Wonder Lyrics - Swipe Me to the Moon
twitter.description: Full lyrics to 'Every Day Is a Wonder' from Swipe Me to the Moon (A Gay Musical) by Agust Islandia. Track 13 of 22 from the groundbreaking gay dating musical.

essay: Every Day Is a Wonder celebrates the brief season when love feels easy and abundant. It documents ordinary joy as narrative evidence that intimacy can feel safe and expansive.
song.lyricsHtml:
He makes me pancake shirtless
What the hell is this life
We've gone three months, and I still text him twice per night
We kiss in parks, we dance in lines, we've memorized each other's signs

He sings in the shower. He moans in French. We've made out on every possible bench
We've hiked through rain, made soup from scratch, and baby our sex life
It's a goddamn
Patchmatch

Every damn day
We're laughing, we're touching, we're tangled in sheets, we're trying new things, and we're eating too sweet
Every damn day
We're talking, we're sweating, we're riding this wave, not trying to fix, just letting love stay

He took me to Prague, I took him to mom, he bought us matching toothbrushes, which should feel wrong
We've had deep talks and drunk karaoke, and we've sexted with gifts that were far from low-key
He bites my shoulder, I steal his hoodies, we fight over movies and cancel on duties
We've been late to brunch and too early to bed. We've had nights where the walls shook and nothing was said

Every damn day
We're making out at train stations, screaming with joy at dumb revelations
Every damn day
He wakes me up with a kiss on my cheek, then we make out again before I can speak

I never knew my body could be this loud. I never knew love could make you proud
I've opened myself. I've shown him it all
And he's still here, he wants it all
Every damn day

We kiss, we laugh, we undress with flair, we make dumb jokes in our underwear
This is not a phase, this is not just a fling, this is sex and soup and the real damn thing
He makes me love him
Every damn day
